---
title: "Hi, I'm Gianluca Bezziccheri"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/G-Bez
---

::: {style="text-align: justify"}
I'm a Management & Marketing graduate, and currently a Financial and actuarial science student, with a passion for R language, data visualization, statistics and, generally speaking, data analysis as a whole. On this blog I share and explain what I learn.
:::
